title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TNT India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at TNT India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TNT India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
